title: Notifications - Device charging
scenario: Charging notification does not appear when headset is plugged in while Poly Lens app is in the background
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and connect a Bluetooth headset that is not fully charged.
2. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
3. Plug the connected headset into its charger.
4. Observe the notification area (status bar / notification shade) on the device.
expected: A notification appears showing the headset name and "Charging" text. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens app's Home screen for the device.
